titleStmt.title: Letter from Monsieur Hymans to Sir Edward Grey, 6 June 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Monsieur Hymans

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Copie.
(109706)
30Z
No. 5529. LEGATION DE BELGIQUE,
Londres
le 6 Juin, 1916
Monsieur le Secrétaire d'Etat Mon Gouvernement vient d'apprendre que la
municipalité de Dublin se propose d'étudier un projet
de transformation du centre de cette ville. projet qui
serait mis à execution á l'occasion de la reconstruction
de la Sackville Street et des rues adjacentes détruites
au cours des récents événments. Le Ministre des Travaux Publice de Belgique, qui
se préoccupe de l'aménagement de nos villes et com—
munes détruites, serais désireux de connaître, en detail,
les différentes solutions qui seraient étudiées par la
municipalité. J'ai l'honneur de recourir aux bons offices de
Votre Excellence en vue d'obtenir que ces renseigne—
ments puissant être mis à ma disposition par les
Autorités Britanniques compétentes, si toutefois la
chose est possible. Je saisis cette occasion de renouveler à Votre
Excellence les assurances de la plus haute considéra—
tion avec laquelle j'ai l'honneur d'être Son très humble et
obeisant serviteur,
(Signé) Hymans. Son Excellency Sir Edward Grey, Bart; K.G., M.P., &c. ,&c. ,&c. ,
In any further communica-
on this subject, please
quote
No 1003/C/1916 The Under-Secretary of State
Foreign Office
London
Reference to previous correspondence:-
Letter from to Foreign Office: The Under-Secretary for state for Foreign Affairs presents
his compliments to the Under-Secretary for
Ireland — and is directed by the Secretary of
State for Foreign Affairs to transmit the accompanying copies of
a letter June 6 which has been received from the
Belgian Minister respecting the
reconstruction of destroyed parts
of Dublin. The Secretary of State would be glad to be advised
what answer should be returned to M. Hymans
Foreign Office
June 10, 1916
Similar letter sent to
